name: Dian Wei

skills.name: Mounting Rage
skills.description: Gains stacks upon getting defeats and assits,for up to 20 stacks.Physical atack increases with each stack

skills.name: Holding on to Sanity
skills.description: Removes crowd controls,gains a movement speed bonus,and enhances the next basic atack to deal extra damage

skills.name: Outburst
skills.description: Damages and slows enemies in range . He becomes enhanced on hit.While enhanced,he gains atack speed and lifesteal.

skills.name: Leap of Fury
skills.description: Jumps to the target,damaging and slowing them while enhancing himself.While enhanced,deals extra true damage to enemies.

tips: Dian Wei is a Medium Warrior (Jungling) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier S with 51.8% win rate and 1.1% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
Best build path: Rapacious Bite → Boots of Resistance → Axe of Torment → Spikemail → Blazing Cape → Longnight Guardian.
Run Cataclysm for stats that match Dian Wei's Warrior kit. Take Smite — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
Standard trade: Holding on to Sanity → Outburst → Leap of Fury → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.
Laning: Clear to level four, then gank the lane with the least escape. Secure Tyrant when your bot or mid has crash wave.
Teamfight: Flank or dive backline after tanks commit. Do not start fights without vision on enemy jungler.
Dian Wei excels into Marco Polo, Musashi. Avoid blind picking into Sun Bin, Diaochan without team peel.

Dian Wei is a Tier S staple in high-elo (Diamond+) on the international server — worth mastering for climb. Pick rate 1.1% — frequently seen in ranked; learn the matchup even if you do not main Dian Wei.

faqs.question: Is Dian Wei good in the current meta?
faqs.answer: Dian Wei is Tier S Warrior with 51.8% win rate, 1.1% pick rate, and 0.4% ban rate on Honor of Kings Global (Camp HOK, 2026-06-05). Strong meta pick for ranked.

faqs.question: What is the best Dian Wei build?
faqs.answer: Core item path: Rapacious Bite, Boots of Resistance, Axe of Torment, Spikemail, Blazing Cape, Longnight Guardian. Run Cataclysm arcana with Smite. Switch to alternate build presets on this page for jungle, clash, or late-game setups.

faqs.question: How to counter Dian Wei?
faqs.answer: Pick Sun Bin, Diaochan into Dian Wei. Deny Jungling resources early and force fights before Dian Wei completes core items. Dian Wei struggles when the enemy can out-range or out-sustain them.

faqs.question: Who does Dian Wei counter?
faqs.answer: Dian Wei is strong into Marco Polo, Musashi according to HoKStats matchup data and role matchups on the global server. Draft Dian Wei when the enemy relies on these heroes in the Jungling lane.

faqs.question: Is Dian Wei good in high rank / Diamond+?
faqs.answer: Dian Wei is a Tier S staple in high-elo (Diamond+) on the international server — worth mastering for climb. Pick rate 1.1% — frequently seen in ranked; learn the matchup even if you do not main Dian Wei.

faqs.question: What lane should Dian Wei play?
faqs.answer: Dian Wei is tagged Jungling in Camp export (Fighter). Clear to level four, then gank the lane with the least escape. Secure Tyrant when your bot or mid has crash wave.

faqs.question: Best arcana and spells for Dian Wei?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Cataclysm arcana. Battle spell: Smite. Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive and jungle need.

faqs.question: Dian Wei or Li Xin — which is better?
faqs.answer: Dian Wei vs Li Xin (Warrior, Tier S+): Li Xin is 1.9% pick / 52.6% WR. Li Xin wins 0.8% more often globally. Choose Dian Wei when you need Jungling identity; choose Li Xin for Clash Lane comfort.

faqs.question: Should I ban Dian Wei?
faqs.answer: Yes in tryhard queues — 0.4% ban rate. Deny if enemy first-picks Warrior.
